types.name: Viruses
types.description: The smallest microorganisms, require host cell

classifications.nonpathogens: Normal flora, mutually beneficial or harmless
classifications.spores: Temporarily inactive, resistant to heat and chemicals

links.example: Respiratory tract, GI tract, blood, skin
Mucous membranes, broken skin, respiratory tract

transmission_methods.contact_direct: Physical transfer from infected person (e.g., sexual contact)
transmission_methods.droplet: Moist particles within 3 feet (e.g., sneezing, coughing)
transmission_methods.airborne: Suspended particles over distances >3 feet (e.g., spores)

medical_asepsis.definition: Practices that confine or reduce numbers of microorganisms (clean technique)
principles: Microorganisms exist everywhere except on sterilized equipment
Frequent hand hygiene is the best method to reduce transmission
Blood, body fluids are major reservoirs of microorganisms
PPE serves as barrier to microbial transmission
The floor, toilets, and sinks are more contaminated
Clean from cleaner to dirtier areas

surgical_asepsis.definition: Measures that render supplies and equipment totally free of microorganisms (sterile technique)
principles: Touch sterile item with sterile item only
Any partially unwrapped sterile package is contaminated
If in doubt about sterility, it is unsterile
Longer time since sterilization increases contamination risk
Expired sterile items are not sterile
Once opened, sterility lasts only a matter of time
Outer 1-inch margin of sterile field is contamination zone
Wet wrapper wicks microorganisms and causes contamination
Reaching across sterile field causes contamination
Items below waist level are contaminated

antimicrobial_agents.soap: Lowers surface tension of oil on skin
antimicrobial_agents.alcohol: Injures protein and lipid structures (70% concentration)
antimicrobial_agents.iodine: Damages cell membrane and disrupts enzymes (Betadine)
antimicrobial_agents.antiseptics: Inhibit growth, do not kill microorganisms
antimicrobial_agents.disinfectants: Destroy active microorganisms but not spores

routine_hand_washing.jewelry: Plain wedding band may be worn
routine_hand_washing.drying: Paper towels, used to turn off faucet

surgical_hand_antisepsis.jewelry: All hand jewelry and watches removed
